'''Tre-na''' served as the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[Dreadnaught-class heavy cruiser/Legends|''Dreadnaught''-class heavy cruiser]] [[Peregrine (Dreadnaught-class)|''Peregrine'']], the [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Garm Bel Iblis/Legends|Garm Bel Iblis]] during the [[Battle of Yaga Minor (Galactic Civil War)|Battle of Yaga Minor]] in what would prove to be the last battle of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

{{Char-stub}}
